title: Latency Nullifier
description: A deeply optimized and polished modpack with almost no additional mods aside from optimizations
body:
### A simple and polished modpack with the minimal set of mods to actually play Minecraft 
Expect blazing-fast boot times and a vanilla-like experience. We don't offer much of any QoL mods aside from Zoom, so this would be the perfect choice for minimalistic people, and for those, who simply don't need any utility mods.

Feel free to also use this modpack as a pre-configured and pre-optimized template for your other projects. Because of the very light and bare nature of this modpack, it shouldn't slow down or cause any issues with anything. So get ready to enjoy your personalized out-of-the-box experience!


‎ 
### ‎ ‎ Let's keep it simple:
- 🔎 Zoom ability
- 🚀 Crazy Otimizations
- ⚡ Instant world quitting
- 💡 Removed lightning engine

## ‎
**As stated above, the lightning engine of Minecraft has completely been removed (by [Methane](https://modrinth.com/mod/methane)). This act significantly improves the client's performance, and as a side effect, also gives you permanent fullbright 💡**
###
If you feel like having shadows and light in Minecraft is important to you, then you should check out our big brother [**Client Necessities**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/client-necessities). We decided to only *Optimize* the ligtning engine there instead of *Removing* it altogether. 

- Note that Methane isn't available for The 1.21.4 versions of this modpack
## 

‎ 
<details>
<summary>⚡ Various optimizations</summary>

- Optimized Achievements
- Optimized Chunk loading performance
- Optimized Boot times
- Patched various Minecraft bugs
- Faster block entity rendering
- Block and Entity culling
- Fast animation and Random function calculations
- Fixed VRAM and RAM leaks
- More efficient memory utilization
- Optimized immediate mode rendering engine
- Optimized Minecraft's networking stack
- Optimized game physics, mob AI, and block ticking
- Removed Light engine for performance gains
- Entity-ticking optimizations
- GPU Utilization for chunk rendering
- Optimized particle rendering
- Optimized game stuttering when under load
- Improved thread scheduling
- Nether portals function faster
- Made the serverlist perform faster
- Faster world load times
- Multithreaded entity calculations
- Entry deduplications

<details>
<summary>
This modpack uses Fabric loader by default, but if you prefer to use Quilt, then you can just simply drag all of the mods and configs to a Quilt instance and it would just work.</summary>

</details>

</details>


‎ 

> 🎈 If you're looking for a more ideal every-day experience enhanced with some of the most **essential QoL mods**, we recommend checking out our most popular modpack [**Client Necessities**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/client-necessities)


> 💫 If you wish to experience the limits of Minecraft's performance, you can check out [this](https://modrinth.com/modpack/limitless-optimizations)
